scripts.dev: npm run build -w packages/shared && concurrently --names "api,front,worker" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,yellow" "npm run dev -w packages/backend" "npm run dev -w packages/frontend" "npm run worker -w packages/backend"
scripts.dev:web: npm run build -w packages/shared && concurrently --names "api,front" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev -w packages/backend" "npm run dev -w packages/frontend"
scripts.dev:desktop: npm run build -w packages/shared && concurrently --names "api,front,worker,tauri" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,yellow,green" "npm run dev -w packages/backend" "npm run dev -w packages/frontend" "npm run worker -w packages/backend" "npm run dev -w packages/desktop"
scripts.infra:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/backend && npm run build -w packages/frontend
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/frontend && npm run build -w packages/desktop
